title: dryopteris chontalensis
intro: Dryopteris chontalensis, also known as the Chontal fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Central America and Mexico. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris chontalensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Dryopteris chontalensis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal capsules and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
